title: Reset Device - Clear Trusted Devices - Clear - No
scenario: "Clear Trusted Devices" confirmation popup "No" button dismisses popup without clearing list or disconnecting headset in Device Settings Reset tab
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Go to the Reset Device tab
Observe the confirmation popup that appears
expected: The confirmation popup closes, the trusted devices list is NOT cleared, and the headset remains connected.
